summary:
Claim: During tooth tipping, PDL fibers experience both compression and stretching simultaneously.  
Evidence: - Fibers on the side moving toward the alveolar crest undergo compression. - Fibers on the opposing side elongate due to tooth displacement.  
Answer: C
